title: Smoke Feast Galangal Wrap
description: A rich, juicy, energizing Tunisian dish featuring galangal wrapped in gluten-free-friendly bread for a satisfying snack or appetizer.
instructions: Prepare the galangal mixture by mixing chopped galangal with minced garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium heat and add olive oil and butter. Once melted and bubbly, add the galangal mixture.
Cook until slightly softened (about 5 minutes), stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and let it cool completely before wrapping in whole wheat wraps.

Preheat your grill or smoker to medium-high heat. Wrap prepared galangal mixture inside a wrap and place on the grill or smoker for about 3-4 minutes per side, until heated through and lightly charred.
Serve hot as an appetizer or snack.
